ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the load measurement */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the load measurement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the measurement was taken */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation where the measurement was taken */,
  "power_plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power plant associated with the load */,
  "load_mw" REAL /* Load in megawatts (MW) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of energy usage (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES load_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., HR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the load category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load category */,
  "average_load_mw" REAL /* Average load in megawatts for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date for the prediction */,
  "predicted_load_mw" REAL /* Predicted load in megawatts (MW) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the load pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load pattern */,
  "average_load_mw" REAL /* Average load in megawatts for the pattern */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the pattern */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the pattern */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)
